meta.title: Virtual & Physical Cards — FinPay Africa
meta.description: Issue branded cards to customers and employees. Real-time spend controls, worldwide acceptance.

hero.headline:
Your brand,
in every wallet
hero.sub: Issue branded virtual or physical Visa / Mastercard cards to anyone in Africa. Real-time spend controls. Instant freeze. Zero card-present fraud.

items.title: Virtual cards — instant
items.body: Spin up virtual cards for online payments, subscriptions, or employee expenses in under 30 seconds via API or dashboard.

items.title: Physical card production
items.body: White-label physical cards with your brand, chip, contactless, and PIN. Delivered anywhere in Africa within 5 business days.

items.title: Real-time spend controls
items.body: Set limits by category, merchant, time, geography, or amount. Freeze / unfreeze any card in milliseconds via API.

items.title: Transaction reporting
items.body: Live transaction feeds, categorised spend analytics, and exportable statements — for your finance team or your customers.

items.title: Instant top-up
items.body: Fund cards directly from your FinPay wallet. Real-time balance updates pushed to your system via Webhooks.

items.title: Full API control
items.body: Create, fund, freeze, and close cards programmatically. Embed card management into your own app with our white-label SDK.

cta.headline:
Launch your card
programme today
cta.sub: From fintech startups to enterprise — we scale with you.
cta.trust: Visa & Mastercard certified · No minimum volume · Full API access
